name: Radiant Chicken Bake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Flour, seasoned with salt and pepper
1 can (4 oz.) Ortega Whole Green Chiles
2 cans (6 oz., each) Snap-E-Tom Tomato Cocktail (or 1 can 10 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly flour the chicken pieces and brown in hot oil in a skillet.
2. Remove the chicken to an oven casserole dish.
3. Slice the chiles into strips and lay on top of the chicken pieces.
4. Combine carrot slices, parsley, onion, garlic salt, oregano, celery, and Snap-E-Tom; pour this mixture on top of the chicken and chiles.
5. Place lemon slices on top of the seasoned chicken.
6. Bake in a preheated oven (350 degrees) for 1 hour, or until tender.
7. Baste the chicken with vegetable/Snap-E-Tom sauce during cooking.
